summary: Verified Team section redesign at 1440x900. Two-column layout works, all data-testids present, both photos load with correct src (HTTP 200) and are visually uncropped, discipline chips + brand pills + LinkedIn CTAs render correctly, and section ordering (TrustBar > Team > UseCases) is preserved. Only deviation: section#team measured 682.69px tall vs. the requested < 620px compactness spec.

issues: Section vertical height is 682.69px which exceeds the requested compact spec of < 620px by ~63px. Both card faces render fine (photo 383x287, aspect 4/3, naturalW=1116, no horizontal overflow), so cropping is NOT an issue — the extra height comes from the card content column (bio + 3 credential rows + LinkedIn CTA) and py-14/py-16 wrappers. Suggestions to reach <620px: (a) reduce section vertical padding from py-14 lg:py-16 to py-10 lg:py-12, (b) tighten card aspect ratio (aspect-[5/3] instead of 4/3) or shrink card internal padding to p-3 with smaller gaps, (c) or accept the current 683px as visually acceptable (still fits primarily within one 900px viewport).

action_items: Optional: shrink #team vertical padding (py-14 lg:py-16 -> py-10 lg:py-12) and/or card aspect ratio to bring section height under 620px per spec. Purely cosmetic — all functional/visual acceptance criteria pass and both faces render uncropped.
critical_code_review_comments: Team.jsx (147 lines) — clean, readable, single-purpose. No refactor needed.
aside uses `lg:sticky lg:top-24` — works when section is taller than aside content but may feel odd if user reduces height further; consider removing sticky if compactness spec is enforced.
Both LinkedIn CTAs point to href='#' placeholder — main agent should provide real LinkedIn URLs before ship.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Team section 2-column redesign verified at lg breakpoint (1440x900). Only outstanding item is section height 682.69px vs spec <620px — cosmetic. LinkedIn hrefs are placeholders ('#'). All other criteria in review_request pass.
rca of the issue: Section height overshoot: py-14/py-16 wrapper = 56/64px vertical padding × 2, plus each card ~450px tall (photo 287 + info block ~163). With 32px of grid gap, right column ends near 570px, plus 60+60 padding = ~690px total. To hit <620px reduce padding to py-10 lg:py-12 and/or trim card info block whitespace.
